content.claim: Depopulation scale is independently documented: 147 localities face eventual complete depopulation; 645 have populations below 300; 114 of those have under-18 populations below 10 percent, which analysts (GKI) consider unlikely to survive without significant development programs.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Political feasibility lens
limitations: Demographic projections assume no policy intervention
Does not isolate school closures as cause versus effect of depopulation
No causal evidence that school retention affects depopulation trajectory
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
